_help: ASDLC-Loop project config — static and committed. 'level' sets rigor; 'commands' are your stack's gate commands (an empty command = that gate is skipped); 'gates' tune the guards. /asdlc-init fills 'commands' for your stack; edit any of it freely.

_levels.prototype: secrets + format only — verify-gate is skipped (spikes, throwaways)
_levels.standard: secrets + format + lint + types + tests + reviewer (default)
_levels.production: standard + tighter diffSize + mandatory review + human ship gate
